page_title: Knit Fabric for Safety Clothes - ArBir 200 - Ariteks
spec_line: 220 g/m², 100% Polyester, High Visible, Woven Like Knit Fabric
description_blocks: %100 polyester, 220 g/m², developed for jackets, raincoats and reflective strips base
Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light.
As a result they shine more than other objects.

technical_documents.context_text: Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Polyester (PES) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 100 Denier EN ISO 2060 Weight 220 ±10 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1500 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Bursting strength > 1500 kPa (kN/m² ) EN ISO 13938-1 Dimensional Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 pH 6.2 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
220 g/m² , 100% Polyester, High Visible, Woven Like Knit Fabric

%100 polyester, 220 g/m², developed for jackets, raincoats and reflective strips base. EN ISO 20471 certified. Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light. As a result they shine more than other objects. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Raincoat, Jacket, Parka Quality Management Done ISO 9001 High Visibility Done EN ISO 20471 Technical Documents >> ArBir 200 Data Sheet Certificates
